CodeManager 0.5 released

I’ve released the source of CodeManager, Version: 0.5, This is the last database-less version (it uses perl hash files), from the next release I will develop a database-friendly version, maybe with sqlite support,Stay Tuned to see progress! To get the source go here: http://code.alexworld.it/ You can read the source code...

Leave a comment

Picasa Badge

I’m happy to announce that after many days of debugging and testing, I’ve published Picasa Badge! (as you can see on the right bar) -> Dependencies: LWP::Simple perl module (namely also: perl-libwww) NOTE: Picasa is a registered trademark of Google Inc. Picasa Badge is not a partner, affiliate, or licensee...

Leave a comment

No more Flickr on my life.

Today I’ve decided to switch from Flickr to Picasa Web Album. My decision was forced by Flickr Free Account’s limits: 100 MB monthly upload limit (10MB per photo) 3 sets Photostream views limited to the 200 most recent images Post any of your photos in up to 10 group pools...

Leave a comment

torrentmanager on code.alexworld.it

Today I’ve published a little but powerful SH script to manage torrent files with enhanced-ctorrent (already known as: ctorrent). You can find it on: http://code.alexworld.it or directly here: http://code.alexworld.it/code/torrentmanager.sh.html Have a nice day! Alessandro.

http://digitaldj.net/tumblrmobile/Use tumblr on your mobile phone thanks to digitaldj.net

A Better way to Display Skype Icon Status

As you can see on bar at right, I’ve added a Skype button, that I think is a better way to display Skype Status using transparency instead of classic button that you can find at: http://www.skype.com/share/buttons/ To use it you must only copy this on your blog bar: <div style=“background-image:...
